_meta.purpose: Canonical marketing copy + SEO for collections. Applied to designs.json/catalog.json via Knowledge/apply_new_collection_copy.js.

hi.name: Hi
description: Some dogs enter a room. This one arrives.
Front-and-centre hellos, tail-first greetings, and a four-legged extrovert who treats every doorway like a stage and every visitor like their own personal fan club.
Every street has a chief greeter. Yours said hello before you'd even got the lead on.
hi.seoTitle: Hi Collection | Friendly Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
hi.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the world's most enthusiastic greeter. Dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers who own the friendliest pup on the street.
hi.ogTitle: Hi Collection | Friendly Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
hi.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the world's most enthusiastic greeter. Dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers who own the friendliest pup on the street.

play-with-ball.name: Play With Ball
description: There are two states of being: ball, and waiting for ball.
Tennis-ball fanatics and fetch addicts — the walkies enthusiast who'd trade dinner for one more throw and stares at the drawer until it happens.
You've got a soggy tennis ball in your pocket right now, haven't you.
play-with-ball.seoTitle: Play With Ball | Funny Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
play-with-ball.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the ball-obsessed. Dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose best friend lives for one more throw.
play-with-ball.ogTitle: Play With Ball | Funny Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
play-with-ball.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the ball-obsessed. Dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose best friend lives for one more throw.

iron-paws-gym.name: Iron Paws Gym
description: Never skip walkies. Never skip leg day. And never, ever skip the treat afterwards.
The gains-chasing, snack-motivated, mirror-loving gym dog who counts every biscuit as a macro and every zoomie as cardio.
You'll know this one by the swagger before you've finished reading.
iron-paws-gym.seoTitle: Iron Paws Gym | Funny Gym Dog Gifts & Wall Art
iron-paws-gym.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the swolest good boy in the gym. Gym dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers who never skip walkies.
iron-paws-gym.ogTitle: Iron Paws Gym | Funny Gym Dog Gifts & Wall Art
iron-paws-gym.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the swolest good boy in the gym. Gym dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers who never skip walkies.

too-glam.name: Too Glam
description: Too glam to give a damn — and far too fabulous for the garden.
A certified drama queen and four-legged fashionista who wouldn't be seen dead in last season's collar and knows exactly which angle is their good side.
There's a full pose before every photo. You know the one.
too-glam.seoTitle: Too Glam | Diva Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
too-glam.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the four-legged fashionista. Diva dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with a pup too fabulous for the garden.
too-glam.ogTitle: Too Glam | Diva Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
too-glam.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the four-legged fashionista. Diva dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with a pup too fabulous for the garden.

pampered-paws.name: Pampered Paws
description: Some dogs have a routine. This one has a spa day.
Preened, pampered and professionally spoiled — the queen of the sofa who treats comfort as a bare minimum and the word 'no' as a personal insult.
Be honest: your dog is treated better than most people you know.
pampered-paws.seoTitle: Pampered Paws | Spoiled Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
pampered-paws.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the professionally spoiled. Luxury dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup lives their best pampered life.
pampered-paws.ogTitle: Pampered Paws | Spoiled Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
pampered-paws.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the professionally spoiled. Luxury dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup lives their best pampered life.

dog-eastwood.name: Dog Eastwood
description: Every town has a good boy. This one just walked into the wrong saloon.
Ponchos at dawn, standoffs over squirrels, and a strong, silent type who stares down the postman at high noon and has never once fetched on command.
All attitude, just enough mystery. Go on — make their day.
dog-eastwood.seoTitle: Dog Eastwood | Cowboy Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
dog-eastwood.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the strong, silent cowboy. Western dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose good boy rules the frontier.
dog-eastwood.ogTitle: Dog Eastwood | Cowboy Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
dog-eastwood.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the strong, silent cowboy. Western dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose good boy rules the frontier.

rock-dogs-guitarist.name: Rock Dogs – Guitarist
description: Every band has a hero. The guitarist is fairly sure it's them.
All swagger, solos and windswept ears — convinced the whole gig hinges on them. (It does. Ask them.)
Give them a spotlight and they'll play the solo twice.
rock-dogs-guitarist.seoTitle: Rock Dogs Guitarist | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-guitarist.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the lead-guitar legend. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup is all swagger and solos.
rock-dogs-guitarist.ogTitle: Rock Dogs Guitarist | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-guitarist.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the lead-guitar legend. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup is all swagger and solos.

rock-dogs-bassist.name: Rock Dogs – Bassist
description: No spotlight. No fuss. Just the coolest member of the band.
Keeps the groove, says little, and quietly holds the whole thing together while everyone else shows off.
A low-key legend who's heard it all and chews on regardless.
rock-dogs-bassist.seoTitle: Rock Dogs Bassist | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-bassist.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the coolest dog in the band. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with an unbothered good boy.
rock-dogs-bassist.ogTitle: Rock Dogs Bassist | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-bassist.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the coolest dog in the band. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with an unbothered good boy.

rock-dogs-drummer.name: Rock Dogs – Drummer
description: Two speeds: full send, and fast asleep.
Loud, relentless and absolutely covered in energy — hits everything at once and treats 4am like the encore nobody asked for.
If it can be knocked over, consider it part of the kit.
rock-dogs-drummer.seoTitle: Rock Dogs Drummer | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-drummer.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the four-legged drummer. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup treats 4am like an encore.
rock-dogs-drummer.ogTitle: Rock Dogs Drummer | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-drummer.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the four-legged drummer. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup treats 4am like an encore.

rock-dogs-keyboards.name: Rock Dogs – Keyboards
description: Every band has one secret genius. It's the one on keys.
Quietly brilliant and quietly running the show — brings the magic while the guitarist takes the credit.
Smart enough to lead, wise enough to let everyone think they're in charge.
rock-dogs-keyboards.seoTitle: Rock Dogs Keyboards | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-keyboards.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the secret genius on keys. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with a quietly brilliant pup.
rock-dogs-keyboards.ogTitle: Rock Dogs Keyboards | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-keyboards.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the secret genius on keys. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with a quietly brilliant pup.

rock-dogs-singer.name: Rock Dogs – Singer
description: Born for the spotlight. Allergic to sharing it.
Show-offs, howlers and born performers who treat the back garden like a sold-out arena.
Told to be quiet once. Chose violence. Take a bow.
rock-dogs-singer.seoTitle: Rock Dogs Singer | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-singer.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the howling frontman. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup was born for the spotlight.
rock-dogs-singer.ogTitle: Rock Dogs Singer | Rock Dog Gifts & Wall Art
rock-dogs-singer.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the howling frontman. Rock-and-roll dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup was born for the spotlight.

hippie-dude.name: Hippie Dude
description: Peace, love and belly rubs, man.
Tie-dye hound, free spirit, professional relaxer — never rushed anywhere in his life and not about to start now.
His whole personality is 'it's all good,' and honestly? It is.
hippie-dude.seoTitle: Hippie Dude | Retro Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
hippie-dude.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the mellowest good boy going. Retro hippie dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with all the good vibes.
hippie-dude.ogTitle: Hippie Dude | Retro Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
hippie-dude.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the mellowest good boy going. Retro hippie dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers with all the good vibes.

hippie-chick.name: Hippie Chick
description: Flowers in her fur, not a care in the world.
Festival soul, daisy-chain wearer, free spirit — follows the sun and her own sweet rhythm, barefoot the whole way.
All flower crowns and good vibes, and absolutely zero rules.
hippie-chick.seoTitle: Hippie Chick | Boho Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
hippie-chick.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the free-spirited flower-power girl. Boho dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup runs on good vibes.
hippie-chick.ogTitle: Hippie Chick | Boho Dog Gifts & Dog Wall Art
hippie-chick.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the free-spirited flower-power girl. Boho dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup runs on good vibes.

plumber.name: Plumber
description: No job too small. No puddle left uninvestigated.
Tape-measure energy, a knowing sniff at the pipes, and a cheeky 'that'll cost ya' look that says the callout started the moment you opened the door.
A hard-grafting good egg who's seen worse — and charges accordingly.
plumber.seoTitle: Plumber Dog | Funny Tradesman Dog Gifts & Art
plumber.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the hard-grafting tradesman pup. Tradesman dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers — no callout too small.
plumber.ogTitle: Plumber Dog | Funny Tradesman Dog Gifts & Art
plumber.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the hard-grafting tradesman pup. Tradesman dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers — no callout too small.

truck-driver.name: Truck Driver
description: King of the road. Master of the motorway. Absolute ruler of the services car park.
Long-haul legend and big-rig royalty — lives for the horizon, the drive-thru, and a good sniff at every lay-by from here to Aberdeen.
Born to ride shotgun. Never once asked 'are we there yet.'
truck-driver.seoTitle: Truck Driver Dog | Trucker Dog Gifts & Wall Art
truck-driver.seoDescription: Funny dog gifts for the big-rig good boy. Trucker dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup lives for the open road.
truck-driver.ogTitle: Truck Driver Dog | Trucker Dog Gifts & Wall Art
truck-driver.ogDescription: Funny dog gifts for the big-rig good boy. Trucker dog art, mugs and gifts for dog lovers whose pup lives for the open road.
